heroSubheading: A friendly, competitive badminton club based in Lymm, Cheshire. All abilities welcome.
aboutText:
Remnants Badminton Club has been one of Lymm's longest-standing badminton clubs. We compete in both the Stockport and Crewe & District leagues, fielding teams across multiple divisions.

We train and play at Lymm Leisure Centre and always welcome new members of all abilities. Whether you're a seasoned player looking for competitive play or a beginner wanting to improve your game, there's a place for you at Remnants.
venueAddress: Lymm Leisure Centre, Reddish Lane, Lymm, WA13 0AL
